name: save_date
label: Save Date
aiDescription: date when the posting was saved

name: company
label: Company / Organization
aiDescription: name of the company or organization posting the job

name: job_title
label: Job Title
aiDescription: title of the job position

name: experience_level
label: Experience Level
aiDescription: one of: junior, mid, senior, lead_manager, not_specified

name: contract_type
label: Contract Type
aiDescription: type of contract (e.g. permanent, fixed-term, internship, freelance, apprenticeship, not_specified)

name: work_mode
label: Work Mode
aiDescription: one of: remote, hybrid, onsite, not_specified

name: location
label: Location
aiDescription: city/country of the workplace (if multiple locations, list them comma-separated)

name: salary_min
label: Salary Min
aiDescription: minimum annual gross salary value, number only without symbols, empty if not stated

name: salary_max
label: Salary Max
aiDescription: maximum annual gross salary value, number only without symbols. If only one value is given, repeat it in both salary_min and salary_max

name: currency
label: Currency
aiDescription: currency code e.g. EUR, USD, GBP - empty if not determinable

name: salary_notes
label: Salary / Benefits Notes
aiDescription: any notes about compensation (e.g. 'gross annual, 13 months', 'plus bonus', 'depending on experience')

name: publish_date
label: Publish Date
aiDescription: date the posting was published in YYYY-MM-DD format if available, otherwise empty

name: deadline
label: Application Deadline
aiDescription: application deadline in YYYY-MM-DD format if available, otherwise empty

name: skills
label: Required Skills
aiDescription: concise list of main required skills/technologies, separated by comma

name: summary
label: Brief Summary
aiDescription: summary of the position in at most 2 sentences

name: notes
label: Notes
aiDescription: any other relevant information not covered by previous fields (e.g. special benefits, required languages), at most 2-3 sentences

name: source
label: Source
aiDescription: source domain of the posting

name: url
label: URL
aiDescription: full URL of the job posting

name: other
label: Other Notes
aiDescription: other notes on the job posting

name: applied_for
label: Application sent?
aiDescription: whether application process was started or not (default: false)
